claims.summary: Prime-phased introspection is intended to avoid temporal aliasing in the self-referential ESN.
claims.disposition: verify the prime schedule and introspection policy remain explicit and separately reported

claims.summary: Pressure velocity and mode-packing oscillation are more informative than a single static fill value.
claims.disposition: verify bridge pressure_trend_v1 and pressure_trend_smoothing_v1 expose pressure velocity, mode packing, spectral drift, and fast-versus-slow edges

claims.summary: Prime phase alignment should be compared against observed pressure and mode-packing transitions.
claims.disposition: route a bounded replay over captured tick and telemetry records without changing the prime schedule

claims.summary: The ESN should predict pressure and adapt rho or exploration noise before pressure accumulates.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because predictive rho and noise adaptation change live reservoir regulation
